summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of Arix.help MVP. Backend: 25/25 pytest cases pass — auth (register/login/me/logout/google invalid 401), projects + files CRUD with starter-file seeding for static framework, chats + real LLM (Claude Sonnet 4.5 via Emergent key, returned 'PONG'), templates returns exactly 14, deployments mocked with URL+logs, admin role-gated (403 free, 200 after promoting role in mongo). Frontend: signup/login redirect to /dashboard, sidebar nav loads Projects/Templates/Deployments/Billing/Team/Settings under /dashboard/* nested routes, Workspace opens Monaco editor with index.html/styles.css/app.js, save/deploy work and emit terminal logs, Templates page shows 14 cards, AI Chat sends + receives real AI markdown response. Found 1 UI overlay bug (Made-with-Emergent badge covers chat-send-button) and missing device-toggle testids in workspace top bar.

ui_bugs.issue: The 'Made with Emergent' fixed badge at bottom-right overlays/covers the orange paper-plane send button (data-testid="chat-send-button"), making it unclickable. The chat can still be submitted via Enter key, but the visible send button is hidden by the badge. Add bottom-right padding/margin (e.g. pr-32 or mb-10) to the form so the button sits above the badge.

Device toggle testids (device-desktop, device-tablet, device-mobile) listed in the spec are not present in DOM. There is no visible device-width switcher in the workspace top bar (only Save/Preview/Upload/Share/Deploy buttons render). Either add the device toggle controls with the required testids or remove from spec.

After clicking workspace-preview-button, [data-testid="preview-iframe"] count was 0 in the right-side panel area. Preview tab appears at the BOTTOM panel (alongside TERMINAL/LOGS) but the iframe may only mount when that tab is active. Verify preview-iframe testid renders on the bottom Preview tab.

No discoverable logout button found via text 'log out' / 'sign out' / aria-label. There is a small icon (arrow-right-from-bracket) next to the user avatar in the sidebar bottom — please add data-testid="logout-button" and an accessible aria-label.

issues: Emergent's 'Made with Emergent' badge (fixed bottom-right) overlaps interactive elements in the bottom-right of pages — most notably the chat-send-button. Add bottom-padding / safe-area for the badge across the app, especially in ChatPanel form.

action_items: Move chat-send-button or add bottom padding to ChatPanel form so it isn't covered by the Made-with-Emergent fixed badge.
Add device-desktop / device-tablet / device-mobile toggle controls to Workspace (or remove from spec) with proper data-testid attributes.
Ensure preview-iframe is rendered with that data-testid when the workspace-preview-button is clicked.
Add data-testid="logout-button" + aria-label to the sidebar logout control.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 641 lines — borderline; consider splitting into routers (auth.py, projects.py, chats.py, deployments.py) for maintainability.
google_session endpoint trusts Emergent session response and sets cookie with secure=True/samesite=none — correct for cross-site iframe preview, good.
_starter_files() returns minimal seed for non-static/react frameworks — fine for MVP but may surprise users selecting Next.js/Vue etc.
PROVIDER_MAP includes gpt-5.2 and gemini-3.1-pro-preview — these are 2025/2026 model IDs supported by emergentintegrations; verify availability under current key tier.
User model exposes 'role' to client which is good for admin gating in UI; JWT does NOT embed role — every protected request re-queries Mongo, which is acceptable for MVP but adds latency.
delete_project does not enforce that user owns project_files (only by project_id) — fine because the project row check above already verifies ownership.
test_credentials: Pytest creates a fresh user each session (TEST_<uuid>@arix.help / Arix2026!). Default test user from /app/memory/test_credentials.md (test.dev@arix.help) was not used; new uuid-suffixed accounts were generated to keep tests idempotent.
seed_data_creation: Each backend test run inserts a fresh user + project + chat + 1 deployment. Admin verification manually promotes user role via motor to ensure 200 on /api/admin/stats (verified).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully green via /app/backend/tests/test_arix_backend.py (run with: pytest backend/tests/test_arix_backend.py -v). Frontend nested routes live under /dashboard/* — DO NOT test /projects, /templates etc as top-level. Chat send via UI button is blocked by Made-with-Emergent overlay; use page.keyboard.press('Enter') as workaround when scripting chat tests until main agent fixes the layout. Workspace deploy + save + terminal logs verified visually.
rca of the issue: Chat send button overlap RCA: The Emergent preview overlay badge is a fixed-position element injected by emergent-main.js at bottom-right with z-index above app content. ChatPanel form footer places its submit button at the right edge with no right-padding, causing the badge (~120x40px) to cover the 32x32 send button. Mitigation: pad the form right side (e.g. add 'pr-28' to <form> or 'mr-28' to the button container) so the button sits clear of the badge. Verified by sending via Enter key (which calls send() directly), which produced a real LLM response from Claude Sonnet 4.5.
